task: research Python asyncio and write a 3 sentence summary
result: Python asyncio is a library designed for concurrent programming that uses coroutines and awaitable tasks instead of traditional multi-threading or multi-processing approaches. It enables efficient I/O operations by allowing non-blocking programs to handle multiple tasks concurrently without the overhead of threads. The library provides tools like EventLoop, run(), and async/await syntax to manage asynchronous operations effectively.

3. asyncio in Python - GeeksforGeeks

4. Asyncio in Python — From beginner to master - Medium
   URL: https://medium.com/codex/asyncio-in-python-from-beginner-to-master-744796e1f0f4

5. Python Async Programming: The Complete Guide - DataCamp
   URL: https://www.datacamp.com/tutorial/python-async-programming
   Speed up your code withPythonasync programming. A step-by-step guide toasyncio, concurrency, efficient HTTP requests, and database integration.

Python asyncio is a library designed for concurrent programming that uses coroutines and awaitable tasks instead of traditional multi-threading or multi-processing approaches. It enables efficient I/O operations by allowing non-blocking programs to handle multiple tasks concurrently without the overhead of threads. The library provides tools like EventLoop, run(), and async/await syntax to manage asynchronous operations effectively.
